# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload Manager
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents for membership site.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Custom Developer
 * Text Domain: user-file-upload
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_File_Upload_Manager {

    const UPLOAD_DIR = 'user-files';
    const MAX_FILE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
    const MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION = 2048;
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'user_file_upload_nonce';
    const NONCE_FIELD = 'user_file_upload_nonce_field';

    private $allowed_mime_types = array(
        'jpg|jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
        'png'      => 'image/png',
        'gif'      => 'image/gif',
        'webp'     => 'image/webp',
        'pdf'      => 'application/pdf',
        'doc'      => 'application/msword',
        'docx'     => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
        'odt'      => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
        'txt'      => 'text/plain',
    );

    private $allowed_extensions = array(
        'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp', 'pdf', 'doc', 'docx', 'odt', 'txt'
    );

    private $image_extensions = array('jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'webp');

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_shortcode('user_uploaded_files', array($this, 'render_user_files'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_admin_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_delete_user_file', array($this, 'ajax_delete_user_file'));
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate'));
    }

    public function init() {
        $this->handle_file_upload();
    }

    public function activate() {
        $this->create_upload_directory();
        $this->create_database_table();
    }

    public function deactivate() {
        // Optionally clean up on deactivation
    }

    private function create_upload_directory() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_DIR;

        if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
        }

        // Create .htaccess to prevent direct PHP execution
        $htaccess_path = trailingslashit($user_files_dir) . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_path)) {
            $htaccess_content = "# Prevent PHP execution\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\\.php$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Order Deny,Allow\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "# Prevent directory listing\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "Options -Indexes\n";
            file_put_contents($htaccess_path, $htaccess_content);
        }

        // Create index.php to prevent directory listing
        $index_path = trailingslashit($user_files_dir) . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_path)) {
            file_put_contents($index_path, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }
    }

    private function create_database_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $table_name (
            id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_id bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
            file_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            original_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            file_path varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_type varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            file_size bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL,
            file_category varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'document',
            upload_date datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            is_active tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY user_id (user_id),
            KEY file_category (file_category)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }

    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_style(
            'user-file-upload-css',
            plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/style.css',
            array(),
            '1.0.0'
        );

        // Inline CSS if external file doesn't exist
        wp_add_inline_style('user-file-upload-css', $this->get_inline_css());

        wp_enqueue_script(
            'user-file-upload-js',
            plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/script.js',
            array('jquery'),
            '1.0.0',
            true
        );

        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload-js', 'userFileUpload', array(
            'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('user_file_ajax_nonce'),
            'maxSize' => self::MAX_FILE_SIZE,
            'maxSizeFormatted' => size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE),
            'allowedExtensions' => $this->allowed_extensions,
        ));
    }

    public function enqueue_admin_scripts($hook) {
        if (strpos($hook, 'user-file-upload') === false) {
            return;
        }
        wp_add_inline_style('wp-admin', $this->get_admin_inline_css());
    }

    private function get_inline_css() {
        return '
            .ufu-upload-form { max-width: 600px; margin: 20px 0; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; background: #fafafa; }
            .ufu-upload-form label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="file"],
            .ufu-upload-form select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"] { background: #0073aa; color: #fff; border: none; padding: 10px 25px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"]:hover { background: #005a87; }
            .ufu-notice { padding: 12px 15px; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 4px; }
            .ufu-notice-success { background: #d4edda; color: #155724; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; }
            .ufu-notice-error { background: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; }
            .ufu-files-list { margin: 20px 0; }
            .ufu-file-item { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 8px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 6px; }
            .ufu-file-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; margin-right: 15px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 18px; }
            .ufu-file-info { flex: 1; }
            .ufu-file-name { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 3px; }
            .ufu-file-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #666; }
            .ufu-file-actions a { margin-left: 10px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; }
            .ufu-file-actions .ufu-delete { color: #dc3545; }
            .ufu-file-preview { width: 40px; height: 40px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 15px; }
            .ufu-login-notice { padding: 20px; background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 6px; }
        ';
    }

    private function get_admin_inline_css() {
        return '
            .ufu-admin-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
            .ufu-admin-table th, .ufu-admin-table td { padding: 10px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; }
            .ufu-admin-table th { background: #f5f5f5; font-weight: 600; }
            .ufu-admin-preview { max-width: 50px; max-height: 50px; border-radius: 4px; }
        ';
    }

    public function handle_file_upload() {
        if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD]) || !isset($_FILES['user_file'])) {
            return;
        }

        // Verify nonce
        if (!wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST[self::NONCE_FIELD])), self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Security verification failed. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Check user is logged in
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();

        // Rate limiting: max 10 uploads per hour
        if ($this->is_rate_limited($current_user_id)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Upload limit reached. Please try again later.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Check total files per user (max 50)
        if ($this->get_user_file_count($current_user_id) >= 50) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Maximum number of files reached. Please delete some files first.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $file = $_FILES['user_file'];
        $category = isset($_POST['file_category']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['file_category'])) : 'document';

        // Validate category
        $valid_categories = array('profile_picture', 'document', 'identification', 'other');
        if (!in_array($category, $valid_categories, true)) {
            $category = 'document';
        }

        // Check for upload errors
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $error_message = $this->get_upload_error_message($file['error']);
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', $error_message);
            return;
        }

        // Validate file size
        if ($file['size'] > self::MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', sprintf(
                __('File size exceeds the maximum limit of %s.', 'user-file-upload'),
                size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE)
            ));
            return;
        }

        if ($file['size'] === 0) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Uploaded file is empty.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Validate the file is actually an uploaded file
        if (!is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Invalid file upload.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Get and validate file extension
        $original_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($original_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));

        if (!in_array($file_extension, $this->allowed_extensions, true)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', sprintf(
                __('File type ".%s" is not allowed. Allowed types: %s', 'user-file-upload'),
                esc_html($file_extension),
                implode(', ', $this->allowed_extensions)
            ));
            return;
        }

        // Validate MIME type using WordPress function
        $wp_filetype = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $original_name, $this->allowed_mime_types);

        if (!$wp_filetype['ext'] || !$wp_filetype['type']) {
            // Fallback: check with finfo
            $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
            $detected_mime = $finfo->file($file['tmp_name']);

            if (!in_array($detected_mime, array_values($this->allowed_mime_types), true)) {
                $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('File content does not match the allowed file types.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        // Additional content validation using finfo regardless
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $detected_mime = $finfo->file($file['tmp_name']);

        if (!in_array($detected_mime, array_values($this->allowed_mime_types), true)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('File content validation failed. The file may be corrupted or disguised.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Cross-check: extension must match detected MIME type
        if (!$this->extension_matches_mime($file_extension, $detected_mime)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('File extension does not match file content.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // For images, perform additional validation
        if (in_array($file_extension, $this->image_extensions, true)) {
            $image_validation = $this->validate_image($file['tmp_name'], $file_extension);
            if (is_wp_error($image_validation)) {
                $this->set_upload_notice('error', $image_validation->get_error_message());
                return;
            }
        }

        // Check for PHP code in file content (basic check for non-binary files)
        if (in_array($file_extension, array('txt', 'doc', 'docx', 'odt'), true)) {
            $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name'], false, null, 0, 1024);
            if ($file_content !== false && preg_match('/<\?php|<\?=|<script/i', $file_content)) {
                $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('File contains potentially malicious content.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        // Prepare upload directory
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_DIR;
        $user_dir = trailingslashit($base_dir) . absint($current_user_id);

        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);

            // Add index.php to user directory
            file_put_contents(trailingslashit($user_dir) . 'index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }

        // Generate unique filename to prevent overwrites and enumeration
        $unique_name = wp_generate_password(16, false, false) . '_' . time() . '.' . $file_extension;
        $destination = trailingslashit($user_dir) . $unique_name;

        // Ensure destination is within expected directory (path traversal prevention)
        $real_user_dir = realpath($user_dir);
        if ($real_user_dir === false) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Upload directory error.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Move the file
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Failed to save the uploaded file. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Verify the moved file is within the expected directory
        $real_destination = realpath($destination);
        if ($real_destination === false || strpos($real_destination, $real_user_dir) !== 0) {
            @unlink($destination);
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('File path validation failed.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Set proper file permissions (read-only for owner and group)
        chmod($destination, 0644);

        // Strip EXIF data from images for privacy
        if (in_array($file_extension, array('jpg', 'jpeg'), true) && function_exists('wp_get_image_editor')) {
            $this->strip_image_metadata($destination);
        }

        // Resize large images
        if (in_array($file_extension, $this->image_extensions, true)) {
            $this->resize_image_if_needed($destination, self::MAX_IMAGE_DIMENSION);
        }

        // If this is a profile picture, deactivate previous profile pictures
        if ($category === 'profile_picture') {
            $this->deactivate_previous_profile_pictures($current_user_id);
        }

        // Save to database
        $relative_path = self::UPLOAD_DIR . '/' . absint($current_user_id) . '/' . $unique_name;
        $saved = $this->save_file_record($current_user_id, $unique_name, $original_name, $relative_path, $detected_mime, filesize($destination), $category);

        if ($saved) {
            // Update rate limit transient
            $this->increment_rate_limit($current_user_id);

            $this->set_upload_notice('success', __('File uploaded successfully!', 'user-file-upload'));

            // If profile picture, update user meta
            if ($category === 'profile_picture') {
                $file_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . $relative_path;
                update_user_meta($current_user_id, 'custom_profile_picture', esc_url_raw($file_url));
            }
        } else {
            @unlink($destination);
            $this->set_upload_notice('error', __('Failed to save file record. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }
    }

    private function extension_matches_mime($extension, $mime) {
        $extension_mime_map = array(
            'jpg'  => array('image/jpeg'),
            'jpeg' => array('image/jpeg'),
            'png'  => array('image/png'),
            'gif'  => array('image/gif'),
            'webp' => array('image/webp'),
            'pdf'  => array('application/pdf'),
            'doc'  => array('application/msword', 'application/octet-stream'),
            'docx' => array('application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document', 'application/zip', 'application/octet-stream'),
            'odt'  => array('application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text', 'application/zip', 'application/octet-stream'),
            'txt'  => array('text/plain'),
        );

        if (!isset($extension_mime_map[$extension])) {
            return false;
        }

        return in_array($mime, $extension_mime_map[$extension], true);
    }

    private function validate_image($tmp_name, $extension) {
        // Verify it's actually an image using getimagesize
        $image_info = @getimagesize($tmp_name);

        if ($image_info === false) {
            return new WP_Error('invalid_image', __('The uploaded file is not a valid image.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        // Check image type matches extension
        $type_extension_map = array(
            IMAGETYPE_JPEG => array('jpg', 'jpeg'),
            IMAGETYPE_PNG  => array('png'),
            IMAGETYPE_GIF  => array('gif'),
            IMAGETYPE_WEBP => array('webp'),
        );

        $image_type = $image_info[2];
        if (isset($type_extension_map[$image_type])) {
            if (!in_array($extension, $type_extension_map[$image_type], true)) {
                return new WP_Error('image_mismatch', __('Image type does not match file extension.', 'user-file-upload'));
            }
        } else {
            return new WP_Error('unsupported_image', __('Unsupported image type.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        // Check image dimensions are reasonable
        if ($image_info[0] > 10000 || $image_info[1] > 10000) {
            return new WP_Error('image_too_large', __('Image dimensions are too large. Maximum 10000x10000 pixels.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        if ($image_info[0] < 1 || $image_info[1] < 1) {
            return new WP_Error('image_too_small', __('Image dimensions are invalid.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function strip_image_metadata($file_path) {
        $editor = wp_get_image_editor($file_path);
        if (!is_wp_error($editor)) {
            $editor->save($file_path);
        }
    }

    private function resize_image_if_needed($file_path, $max_dimension) {
        $image_info = @getimagesize($file_path);
        if ($image_info === false) {
            return;
        }

        if ($image_info[0] > $max_dimension || $image_info[1] > $max_dimension) {
            $editor = wp_get_image_editor($file_path);
            if (!is_wp_error($editor)) {
                $editor->resize($max_dimension, $max_dimension, false);
                $editor->set_quality(85);
                $editor->save($file_path);
            }
        }
    }

    private function save_file_record($user_id, $file_name, $original_name, $file_path, $file_type, $file_size, $category) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $table_name,
            array(
                'user_id'       => absint($user_id),
                'file_name'     => sanitize_file_name($file_name),
                'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($original_name),
                'file_path'     => sanitize_text_field($file_path),
                'file_type'     => sanitize_mime_type($file_type),
                'file_size'     => absint($file_size),
                'file_category' => sanitize_text_field($category),
                'upload_date'   => current_time('mysql'),
                'is_active'     => 1,
            ),
            array('%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );

        return $result !== false;
    }

    private function deactivate_previous_profile_pictures($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $wpdb->update(
            $table_name,
            array('is_active' => 0),
            array(
                'user_id'       => absint($user_id),
                'file_category' => 'profile_picture',
                'is_active'     => 1,
            ),
            array('%d'),
            array('%d', '%s', '%d')
        );
    }

    private function is_rate_limited($user_id) {
        $transient_key = 'ufu_rate_' . absint($user_id);
        $count = get_transient($transient_key);
        return $count !== false && intval($count) >= 10;
    }

    private function increment_rate_limit($user_id) {
        $transient_key = 'ufu_rate_' . absint($user_id);
        $count = get_transient($transient_key);

        if ($count === false) {
            set_transient($transient_key, 1, HOUR_IN_SECONDS);
        } else {
            set_transient($transient_key, intval($count) + 1, HOUR_IN_SECONDS);
        }
    }

    private function get_user_file_count($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        return (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d AND is_active = 1",
            absint($user_id)
        ));
    }

    private function get_upload_error_message($error_code) {
        $messages = array(
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => __('The uploaded file exceeds the server upload limit.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => __('The uploaded file exceeds the form upload limit.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => __('The file was only partially uploaded. Please try again.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => __('No file was uploaded. Please select a file.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => __('Server configuration error. Please contact support.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => __('Failed to write file to disk. Please contact support.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => __('File upload stopped by a server extension.', 'user-file-upload'),
        );

        return isset($messages[$error_code])
            ? $messages[$error_code]
            : __('An unknown upload error occurred.', 'user-file-upload');
    }

    private function set_upload_notice($type, $message) {
        if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE && !headers_sent()) {
            // Use transients instead of sessions for WordPress compatibility
        }
        set_transient('ufu_notice_' . get_current_user_id(), array(
            'type'    => $type,
            'message' => $message,
        ), 60);
    }

    private function get_upload_notice() {
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        if (!$user_id) {
            return null;
        }

        $notice = get_transient('ufu_notice_' . $user_id);
        if ($notice) {
            delete_transient('ufu_notice_' . $user_id);
        }
        return $notice;
    }

    public function render_upload_form($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufu-login-notice">' .
                sprintf(
                    __('Please <a href="%s">log in</a> to upload files.', 'user-file-upload'),
                    esc_url(wp_login_url(get_permalink()))
                ) .
                '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category' => '',
            'title'    => __('Upload File', 'user-file-upload'),
        ), $atts, 'user_file_upload');

        ob_start();

        // Display notice if any
        $notice = $this->get_upload_notice();
        if ($notice) {
            printf(
                '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-notice-%s">%s</div>',
                esc_attr($notice['type']),
                esc_html($notice['message'])
            );
        }

        ?>
        <div class="ufu-upload-form">
            <h3><?php echo esc_html($atts['title']); ?></h3>
            <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" id="ufu-upload-form">
                <?php wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_FIELD); ?>

                <label for="file_category"><?php esc_html_e('File Category', 'user-file-upload'); ?></label>
                <select name="file_category" id="file_category">
                    <?php if (empty($atts['category'])) : ?>
                        <option value="profile_picture"><?php esc_html_e('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload'); ?></option>
                        <option value="document"><?php esc_html_e('Document', 'user-file-upload'); ?></option>
                        <option value="identification"><?php esc_html_e('Identification', 'user-file-upload'); ?></option>
                        <option value="other"><?php esc_html_e('Other', 'user-file-upload'); ?></option>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($atts['category']); ?>" selected>
                            <?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $atts['category']))); ?>
                        </option>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </select>

                <label for="user_file"><?php esc_html_e('Select File', 'user-file-upload'); ?></label>
                <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file" required
                       accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.odt,.txt" />

                <p class="ufu-file-info-text">
                    <?php printf(
                        esc_html__('Allowed types: %s. Maximum size: %s', 'user-file-upload'),
                        esc_html(implode(', ', $this->allowed_extensions)),
                        esc_html(size_format(self::MAX_FILE_SIZE))
                    ); ?>
                </p>

                <input type="submit" value="<?php esc_attr_e('Upload File', 'user-file-upload'); ?>" />
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function render_user_files($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufu-login-notice">' .
                sprintf(
                    __('Please <a href="%s">log in</a> to view your files.', 'user-file-upload'),
                    esc_url(wp_login_url(get_permalink()))
                ) .
                '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'category' => '',
            'title'    => __('Your Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload'),
        ), $atts, 'user_uploaded_files');

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = $this->get_user_files($current_user_id, $atts['category']);

        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="ufu-files-list">
            <h3><?php echo esc_html($atts['title']); ?></h3>

            <?php if (empty($files)) : ?>
                <p><?php esc_html_e('No files uploaded yet.', 'user-file-upload'); ?></p>
            <?php else : ?>
                <?php foreach ($files as $file) : ?>
                    <div class="ufu-file-item" data-file-id="<?php echo absint($file->id); ?>">
                        <?php
                        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
                        $file_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . $file->file_path;
                        $is_image = strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0;
                        ?>

                        <?php if ($is_image) : ?>
                            <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" alt="<?php echo esc_attr($file->original_name); ?>" class="ufu-file-preview" />
                        <?php else : ?>
                            <div class="ufu-file-icon">
                                <?php echo esc_html($this->get_file_icon($file->file_type)); ?>
                            </div>
                        <?php endif; ?>

                        <div class="ufu-file-info">
                            <div class="ufu-file-name"><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></div>
                            <div class="ufu-file-meta">
                                <?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?> &bull;
                                <?php echo esc_html(size_format($file->file_size)); ?> &bull;
                                <?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file->upload_date))); ?>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="ufu-file-actions">
                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                <?php esc_html_e('View', 'user-file-upload'); ?>
                            </a>
                            <a href="#" class="ufu-delete" data-file-id="<?php echo absint($file->id); ?>"
                               data-nonce="<?php echo esc_attr(wp_create_nonce('delete_file_' . $file->id)); ?>">
                                <?php esc_html_e('Delete', 'user-file-upload'); ?>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                <?php endforeach; ?>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    private function get_file_icon($mime_type) {
        $icons = array(
            'application/pdf' => '📄',
            'application/msword' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => '📝',
            'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text' => '📝',
            'text/plain' => '📃',
        );

        return isset($icons[$mime_type]) ? $icons[$mime_type] : '📎';
    }

    private function get_user_files($user_id, $category = '') {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        if (!empty($category)) {
            return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d AND file_category = %s AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY upload_date DESC",
                absint($user_id),
                sanitize_text_field($category)
            ));
        }

        return $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY upload_date DESC",
            absint($user_id)
        ));
    }

    public function ajax_delete_user_file() {
        // Verify AJAX nonce
        if (!isset($_POST['nonce']) || !isset($_POST['file_id'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Invalid request.', 'user-file-upload')));
        }

        $file_id = absint($_POST['file_id']);

        if (!wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['nonce'])), 'delete_file_' . $file_id)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('Security verification failed.', 'user-file-upload')));
        }

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('You must be logged in.', 'user-file-upload')));
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        // Get file record - ensure it belongs to current user
        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d AND user_id = %d AND is_active = 1",
            $file_id,
            $current_user_id
        ));

        if (!$file) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => __('File not found or access denied.', 'user-file-upload')));
        }

        // Delete physical file
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $file_path = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . $file->file_path;

        // Verify the file path is within expected directory
        $real_path = realpath($file_path);
        $expected_base = realpath(trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_DIR);

        if ($real_path && $expected_base && strpos($real_path, $expected_base) === 0) {
            @unlink($real_path);
        }

        // Soft delete in database
        $wpdb->update(
            $table_name,
            array('is_active' => 0),
            array('id' => $file_id, 'user_id' => $current_user_id),
            array('%d'),
            array('%d', '%d')
        );

        // If it was a profile picture, remove user meta
        if ($file->file_category === 'profile_picture') {
            delete_user_meta($current_user_id, 'custom_profile_picture');
        }

        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => __('File deleted successfully.', 'user-file-upload')));
    }

    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload'),
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload'),
            'manage_options',
            'user-file-upload',
            array($this, 'render_admin_page'),
            'dashicons-media-document',
            30
        );
    }

    public function render_admin_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(__('You do not have sufficient permissions to access this page.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        // Handle admin file deletion
        if (isset($_POST['admin_delete_file']) && isset($_POST['admin_file_nonce'])) {
            $file_id = absint($_POST['admin_delete_file']);
            if (wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['admin_file_nonce'])), 'admin_delete_file_' . $file_id)) {
                $this->admin_delete_file($file_id);
                echo '<div class="notice notice-success"><p>' . esc_html__('File deleted.', 'user-file-upload') . '</p></div>';
            }
        }

        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $page_num = isset($_GET['paged']) ? max(1, absint($_GET['paged'])) : 1;
        $per_page = 20;
        $offset = ($page_num - 1) * $per_page;

        $total_files = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table_name WHERE is_active = 1");
        $total_pages = ceil($total_files / $per_page);

        $files = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT f.*, u.display_name, u.user_email
             FROM $table_name f
             LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->users} u ON f.user_id = u.ID
             WHERE f.is_active = 1
             ORDER BY f.upload_date DESC
             LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
            $per_page,
            $offset
        ));

        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1><?php esc_html_e('User Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload'); ?></h1>

            <p><?php printf(esc_html__('Total active files: %d', 'user-file-upload'), $total_files); ?></p>

            <table class="ufu-admin-table widefat striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('ID', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Preview', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('User', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('File Name', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Category', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Type', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Size', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Date', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                        <th><?php esc_html_e('Actions', 'user-file-upload'); ?></th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if (empty($files)) : ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="9"><?php esc_html_e('No files found.', 'user-file-upload'); ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php else : ?>
                        <?php foreach ($files as $file) :
                            $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
                            $file_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . $file->file_path;
                            $is_image = strpos($file->file_type, 'image/') === 0;
                        ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo absint($file->id); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <?php if ($is_image) : ?>
                                        <img src="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" class="ufu-admin-preview" alt="" />
                                    <?php else : ?>
                                        <?php echo esc_html($this->get_file_icon($file->file_type)); ?>
                                    <?php endif; ?>
                                </td>
                                <td>
                                    <?php echo esc_html($file->display_name); ?><br />
                                    <small><?php echo esc_html($file->user_email); ?></small>
                                </td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file->original_name); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file->file_category))); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file->file_type); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(size_format($file->file_size)); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($file->upload_date))); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url($file_url); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                        <?php esc_html_e('View', 'user-file-upload'); ?>
                                    </a>
                                    <form method="post" style="display:inline;" onsubmit="return confirm('<?php esc_attr_e('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'user-file-upload'); ?>');">
                                        <?php wp_nonce_field('admin_delete_file_' . $file->id, 'admin_file_nonce'); ?>
                                        <button type="submit" name="admin_delete_file" value="<?php echo absint($file->id); ?>"
                                                class="button-link" style="color:#dc3545;">
                                            <?php esc_html_e('Delete', 'user-file-upload'); ?>
                                        </button>
                                    </form>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>

            <?php if ($total_pages > 1) : ?>
                <div class="tablenav">
                    <div class="tablenav-pages">
                        <?php
                        echo paginate_links(array(
                            'base'      => add_query_arg('paged', '%#%'),
                            'format'    => '',
                            'prev_text' => __('&laquo; Previous', 'user-file-upload'),
                            'next_text' => __('Next &raquo;', 'user-file-upload'),
                            'total'     => $total_pages,
                            'current'   => $page_num,
                        ));
                        ?>
                    </div>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>

            <hr />
            <h2><?php esc_html_e('Shortcodes', 'user-file-upload'); ?></h2>
            <ul>
                <li><code>[user_file_upload]</code> - <?php esc_html_e('Display the file upload form', 'user-file-upload'); ?></li>
                <li><code>[user_file_upload category="profile_picture" title="Upload Profile Picture"]</code> - <?php esc_html_e('Upload form for specific category', 'user-file-upload'); ?></li>
                <li><code>[user_uploaded_files]</code> - <?php esc_html_e('Display user\'s uploaded files', 'user-file-upload'); ?></li>
                <li><code>[user_uploaded_files category="document"]</code> - <?php esc_html_e('Display files from specific category', 'user-file-upload'); ?></li>
            </ul>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    private function admin_delete_file($file_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';

        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d AND is_active = 1",
            absint($file_id)
        ));

        if (!$file) {
            return false;
        }

        // Delete physical file
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $file_path = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . $file->file_path;

        $real_path = realpath($file_path);
        $expected_base = realpath(trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . self::UPLOAD_DIR);

        if ($real_path && $expected_base && strpos($real_path, $expected_base) === 0) {
            @unlink($real_path);
        }

        // Soft delete
        $wpdb->update(
            $table_name,
            array('is_active' => 0),
            array('id' => absint($file_id)),
            array('%d'),
            array('%d')
        );

        if ($file->file_category === 'profile_picture') {
            delete_user_meta($file->user_id, 'custom_profile_picture');
        }

        return true;
    }
}

// Initialize the plugin
new User_File_Upload_Manager();

// Frontend JavaScript (inline since we may not have the assets directory)
add_action('wp_footer', function() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return;
    }
    ?>
    <script type="text/javascript">
    (function($) {
        'use strict';

        // Client-side file validation
        $('#user_file').on('change', function() {
            var file = this.files[0];
            if (!file) return;

            var maxSize = parseInt(userFileUpload.maxSize);
            var allowedExt = userFileUpload.allowedExtensions;
            var ext = file.name.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();

            if (allowedExt.indexOf(ext) === -1) {
                alert('File type ".' + ext + '" is not allowed.\nAllowed types: ' + allowedExt.join(', '));
                this.value = '';
                return;
            }

            if (file.size > maxSize) {
                alert('File size exceeds the maximum limit of ' + userFileUpload.maxSizeFormatted + '.');
                this.value = '';
                return;
            }
        });

        // AJAX file deletion
        $(document).on('click', '.ufu-delete', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            if (!confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this file?')) {
                return;
            }

            var $link = $(this);
            var fileId = $link.data('file-id');
            var nonce = $link.data('nonce');
            var $item = $link.closest('.ufu-file-item');

            $.ajax({
                url: userFileUpload.ajaxUrl,
                type: 'POST',
                data: {
                    action: 'delete_user_file',
                    file_id: fileId,
                    nonce: nonce
                },
                beforeSend: function() {
                    $item.css('opacity', '0.5');
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    if (response.success) {
                        $item.fadeOut(300, function() {
                            $(this).remove();
                        });
                    } else {
                        alert(response.data.message || 'Error deleting file.');
                        $item.css('opacity', '1');
                    }
                },
                error: function() {
                    alert('An error occurred. Please try again.');
                    $item.css('opacity', '1');
                }
            });
        });

        // Form submission validation
        $('#ufu-upload-form').on('submit', function() {
            var fileInput = $('#user_file')[0];
            if (!fileInput.files || !fileInput.files[0]) {
                alert('Please select a file to upload.');
                return false;
            }
            $(this).find('input[type="submit"]').prop('disabled', true).val('Uploading...');
        });

    })(jQuery);
    </script>
    <?php
});
